title: Cardiac 30-day readmission study design
summary: The Vienna Cardiac Research Consortium wants a privacy-safe segment-level view of 30-day readmissions to help shape an upcoming multi-site study. The hospital (receiver) chooses the segmentation and minimum cell size; the sender never sees rows.

requestedCapabilities.reason: The request expects one or more approved cardiac admissions exports (EHR, and optionally a research registry copy).
The final segment-level report is staged for hospital approval before it leaves the device.

outputContract.description: Privacy-safe segment-level readmission report for the research consortium.
